chapter_title.en: Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

text: 4523 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "أَيُّمَا اِمْرَأَةٍ وَضَعَتْ ثَوْبَهَا فِي غَيْرِ مَنْزِلِ زَوْجِهَا أَوْ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِهِ لَمْ تَزَلْ فِي لَعْنَةِ اَللَّهِ إِلَى أَنْ تَرْجِعَ إِلَى بَيْتِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4523 - Imam (as) said:
"Any woman who removes her clothing outside her husband's house or without his permission remains under the curse of Allah (swt) until she returns to her home."
